## **Charm Offensive Professional is for you if...**

- You’ve got a few clients, but are reliant on word of mouth to get more - and you want to **be more proactive in your sales tactics.**

- You've been in business a little while, but want to **make some big leaps.**

- You want to go from working with smaller clients to **big brands** (or whoever your dream clients are).

- You want to **get PR coverage** for yourself or your clients.

- You want to **add a new revenue stream** by learning to build a tribe just like Charm Offensive Professional, to sell your expertise at scale.

- You want **the** **support of a community** of digital entrepreneurs, marketers, sales professionals, freelancers, developers, copywriters, VAs, cartoonists, magicians, and other assorted but talented weirdos.

**The value he provides in this subscription (especially with the price it is) is unbelievable!** Every response I got to my cold emails has given me such a buzz, and made me very, very appreciative!! If you have a business and are looking to reach out to new prospects, Jon’s methods are definitely the right way to go!

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/Screen-Shot-2020-01-07-at-09.50.59.png)

**The support from Jon, Gary, and all other the charm pro members is invaluable** and no matter where you are in your business journey, their smarts are ridiculously useful.

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/Screen-Shot-2019-11-29-at-12.16.23.png)

Or you can believe that there is no one better to directly sell your offer than you.

That's why you should join Charm Pro because it's true.

Charm pro is really great and as good as we all say it is.

Access every training and template I've ever created, all future materials, **plus** the support of the community to achieve your business goals.

## **First off: here's what I've recently added to the library:**

## **Charming Direct Mail Template Pack**

![Charming Direct Mail Pack](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/direct-mail-pack.jpg)

_(Value: £499)_

#### **Outrageously creative direct mail templates that will get the attention of busy prospects and get them to respond!**

With more and more competition in the inbox, sending a physical direct mail letter will help your pitch get read.

Direct mail has been one of my favourite ways of getting the attention of busy prospects.

With so many focused on reaching prospects online through cold email or cold DMs, it makes wise strategic sense to go 'old school' and send something in the post. There's a lot less competition there.

However, if you send something boring, it's still going to be ineffective. It'll likely get opened, but if the contents are boring and uninspired, it'll be thrown in the bin as quickly as it'd be deleted from their inbox.

If you can be creative and entertaining, you can get incredible results.

Enter the Charming Direct Mail Template Pack.

## **Charming Job Application Template Pack**

![Charming Job Application Template Pack](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/charming-job-application-template-pack.jpg)

_(Value: £499)_

#### **Charming templates for email, LinkedIn and Facebook that help you actually get hired (without sounding like a robot)**

This pack gives you everything you need to land more interviews, without selling your soul to ChatGPT.

This is for you if...

- You want your personality to come through, but you don’t want to overshare or overthink it
- You’re job hunting, freelancing, or doing both at once
- You’ve got skills but freeze every time you open a blank doc
- You want to be taken seriously without sounding like you copied ChatGPT verbatim
- You’re tired of writing the same pitch 400 times from scratch

The Charming Job Application Template Pack includes templates for cover letters, responding to posts on Facebook job boards or on LinkedIn, pitches for Fiverr, and for following up.

## **The Facebook Ads Lead Generation Template Pack**

![The Facebook Ads Lead Generation Template Pack](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/facebook-ads-lead-gen-template-pack.jpg)

_(Value: £899)_

#### **Easily create charming, high-engagement Facebook ads that start conversations with new clients.**

You’ve seen countless examples of Charm Offensive templates getting excited, enthusiastic responses from prospects.

Charming Copy works across media types. This includes Facebook ads.

This pack helps freelance professionals (and agency owners) generate positive engagement on their ads, while delivering leads.

The positive engagement lowers for Cost Per Thousand Impressions, meaning your ads perform better.

In addition, all of the engagement acts as social proof, making you look like someone clients should do business with.

If you offer professional services, this pack is for you.

## **How To Be an Email Marketer**

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/HOW-TO-BE.png)

_(Value: £899)_

#### **Email is my best performing channel by far. How To Be An Email Marketer will reveal how to write effective email sequences to launch new products, put on flash sales, generate sales using automation, and much more...**

Email marketing is incredibly powerful.

It's not just me saying that! Check out these stats:

- Emails are 40 times more effective at acquiring new customers compared to platforms like Facebook and Twitter.
- A significant 72% of consumers prefer receiving promotional content through email over other forms of communication, such as social media.
- Welcome emails have an exceptional open rate of 82%, making them one of the most effective types of email to build immediate engagement with new subscribers.

(Sources: WorldMetrics, Virfice, Inboxally)

I can personally attest to the power of email. Without my list, I wouldn't have a business. It's responsible for the vast majority of my revenue.

Let me teach you how to start making the most of email - whether you're just starting out with a new list, or wanting to start marketing more effectively to an existing audience.

## **The Charm Offensive Guide to Joint Ventures**

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/jv-pack.jpeg)

_(Value: £989)_

#### **Learn how I developed relationships with influential experts and organised deals to sell my products to their audiences.**

I've been able to get high profile experts like Ben Settle, Daniel Throssell, Kim Krause Schwalm, Ian Stanley, Bill Mueller, Chris Orzechowski, and many others to sell my products to their engaged audiences. This guide shows you how I did it.

I'll show you how I:

- Develop offers that experts with engaged audiences want to sell to their audiences.

- Build relationships with experts with engaged email lists and/or social media followings. This will cover long-term relationship building and a more immediate approach.

- Nurture relationships over time so we continue to do business together.

- Agree upon revenue splits, payment terms, campaign lengths and other important variables.

- Maximise the Average Order Value and overall revenue of the campaigns. This change led to last year's JV with Ben Settle being the most successful of all time, despite it being the 5th time Ben has promoted the offer to his list.

## **Let's have a look at the rest of the template packs...**

## **Get Work with Agencies: Training & Template Pack**

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/How-to-get-work-from-agencies-pack.png)

_(Value: £399)_

#### **Learn how to research agencies and contact them for remote full-time work or freelance gigs.**

Agencies have sales people that are constantly bringing in new work. Often agencies will need new talent to be able to fulfil the work. If you can impress them with a cold pitch that makes them smile, they'll often be up for a conversation about how you can help them.

I've created a training video and a set of cold pitch templates that you can use to start conversations with marketing, advertising, copywriting, PR or web design & development agencies.

This pack comes with:

- A training video showing you how to research agencies and get their contact details.

- Several charming cold pitch templates you can easily amend.

- There’s a template for newbies who don’t have experience and a version for people with experience.

- There's also a version of each template for a) seeking a full-time position and b) freelance work.

## **The Charming Business Memes Pack**

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/robinmemes.jpeg)

_(Value: £499)_

#### **Posting relevant, funny memes alongside your social media posts increases engagement. Introducing The Charming Business Memes Pack!**

In the Business Memes pack, I show you exactly how to create memes using well known formats that are relevant to your business and the social media content you want to post.

I provide examples and the thinking behind them, enabling you to create your own.

You don't even need Photoshop or a Canva subscription! You can use a simple online tool to add the copy and generate your customised meme and download it.

Then all you need to do is to attach your newly created meme to your social media post - and BOOM - you’ll be able to get much more engagement. And because you've got much more engagement, you'll get much more reach!

## **The Charming Short-Form Copy Pack**

![A person about to start writing a note on a piece of paper](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/short-form-templates.jpg)

_(Value: £899)_

#### **I have a rule when it comes to writing cold pitches. Be funny. If you can’t be funny, be clever. If you can’t be clever, keep that shit short. Now you can do all three with the Charming Short-Form Template Pack.**

14 short, concise cold pitch templates, oozing with charm and disarming candour, that will grab your prospects' attention. Put them to work getting more clients, connecting with people you have something in common with, inviting yourself onto podcasts, and much more.

## **The Charming AI Pack**

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/charming-ai-pack.jpg)

_(Value: £999)_

#### **Use the power of AI to generate charming lines for your emails and other content.**

In the beginning, I arrogantly thought “ChatGPT can’t understand humour. It’s too nuanced.”

One day, I decided to see if I could get ChatGPT to learn some of my formulas for syntax-based humour. I taught it a simple one, and it got it.

Then I tried another more complicated technique, and it got that too.

It even understood how the technique worked and why it would be received well by readers.

You will be able to train ChatGPT to give you a near unlimited amount of lines based on the techniques you teach it - let me show you the exact prompts I use.

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2023/02/charming-dms-template-pack.png)

_(Value: £799)_

#### **Want enthusiastic, positive replies to your sales DMs? Now you can charm your way to more clients and sales without having to faff around with tech or finding email addresses.**

You probably already know how effective charming cold pitches sent via email are.

However, cold emailing comes with difficulties and extra effort such as having to set up the tech infrastructure to deploy them and finding prospects' email addresses.

DMs are far easier. This pack contains scripts to charm through this medium.

#### Check out what's included

This pack contains templates for...

- Getting the attention of someone highly influential who you admire

- Getting a response from your dream clients with the aim of working with them

- Inviting yourself onto relevant podcasts

- Getting the attention of journalists to write a story about you or publish your content

![The charming copywriting template pack](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/charming-copywriting-template-pack.jpg)

_(Value: £799)_

A lot of copywriters are fantastic at selling other company's products but awful at selling themselves. On top of that, there's tons of competition. To get new clients, you need to stand out.

Cold pitching enables you to pick and choose the prospects you want to work with. It's hugely scalable, too. My Charming Templates will help you stand out in inboxes and get you positive responses that you can turn into new clients.

#### Check out the templates

- A cheeky email to send to clients who you’ve sent a proposal to but not had a decision from yet
- An email to send to previous clients whom you’d like to work with again

- An email to send to existing clients to get testimonials


## **The Personalised Cold Pitch Template Pack**

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/personalised-cold-pitch-template-pack.jpg)

_(Value: £789)_

#### **Charming copy + personalisation = the most potent, response generating cold pitch methodology there is.**

This pack contains templates personalised cold pitches plus some bonus training materials where I analyse these examples, allowing you to apply these techniques when writing your own.

This process also allows you to move away from a less 'spaghetti against the wall' approach and forces you to focus on researching prospects you actually want to work with.

#### Check out what's included

This pack contains templates for the following situations:

- Suggesting improvements for a Facebook / Instagram / Google ad that you've come across without coming off condescending or annoying.

- Fixing a bug / usability error / spelling mistake on a website, again, without coming across as some irksome jobsworth

- Sending ideas to a prospect (whatever your discipline may be)

- Contacting a company you used to work for, offering your services

- Pitching your wares to suppliers you're particularly fond of

- Starting conversations with prospects who went to the same college or university as you

- Disarming prospects who are based in a city you love, or would love to visit in future

- Direct messaging prospects on LinkedIn who've posted some content you agreed with or highly enjoyed for whatever reason

- Getting in touch with prospects who've just been promoted or got a new job at a new company

- Messaging prospects who've engaged with your content in some way on LinkedIn

- Generating positive responses from companies who share your values and principles

- Inviting podcast guests onto your podcast, showing that you've followed their work and would genuinely love to have a great conversation with them

- Inviting yourself onto podcasts you like and are relevant, showing that you've watched previous episodes and believe you're a good fit

- Getting in touch with journalists to convince them to run a story about your business (or use it for your clients)

- Sending a delightfully honest cold pitch to a prospect that states the key reasons you think you're the perfect supplier and that you'd have a great working relationship

## **Copy My Copy**

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/Screenshot-2020-08-11-at-08.42.35.png)

_(Value: £1,014)_

#### **A variety of my most effective charming copy templates - and the crafty tactics, formulas, devices, and little nuances that make them so successful.**

Imagine being able to write your own stand out, disarming copy that enables you to open opportunities for yourself whenever you want - and achieve whatever your heart (or bank account) desires.

Well, there's no need to merely daydream. I'm giving you the exact copy templates to be able to do all of these things - and more.

You'll not only get the templates, you'll get a line-by-line breakdown of every tactic, device, formula, and nuance contained in my unorthodox, impressive, persuasive, disarming, effective copy templates.

#### Check out the templates

The templates with line-by-line analyses:

- A fawning, gushing cold pitch to send to your absolute dream clients that they will struggle to ignore.
- The original drunk cold email that generated gushing, positive responses from senior decision makers at some of the world's largest brands - including Symantec, Hewlett Packard, and many more.
- The variation of the drunk cold email that led to the editor of Venturebeat covering our client, Symantec. (And later, aided us getting coverage in places like Time Magazine, The Guardian, The Independent, and many other gigantic publications.)
- The outreach email that generated positive responses from authoritative podcasts - helping me grow the Charm Offensive Facebook Group and email list when I was just getting started building an audience.
- A playful follow-up sequence (containing 7 emails) comparing the average costs of your service to a range of ridiculous products and services.
- A cold pitch offering a brainstorm for $1. This diabolically attention-grabbing cold pitch will get attention - and responses.
- A cold pitch for when you dial down the absurdity a little. A more succinct, less silly email (but still charming) to send to prospects.
- An unorthodox LinkedIn connection invitation that your prospects will read and pique their curiosity enough that they will take a look at your profile (and accept your request).
- A disarming follow-up LinkedIn direct message template for sending to your new connections that makes your prospects smile and reply positively.

- A bold cold opening gambit that states the top 5 reasons your target prospect should work with you. This pitch can be personalised (and thus made more effective) if a prospect has divulged sufficient information available on their social media profiles.
- A refreshing and irreverent email to book as many informal job interview meetings with companies as you wish - even if you've never worked in their sector before.

Additional templates:

- An amusing, self-aware email to send prospects who haven't responded after you sent a proposal.
- A sweet succinct email to start fresh commercial conversations with your old clients that you enjoyed working with.
- A highly effective email for chasing invoices and getting them paid, pronto! Use this email for when a client STILL hasn’t paid your invoice. There are two versions of this email. One for smaller businesses with no accounts department and one for larger businesses with enormous impenetrable accounts departments.
- A highly amusing, and effective cart abandonment email that makes prospects smile - and then buy your stuff!
- A charm-soaked Facebook ad I wrote for a local rock bar that got a ton of engagement. (BONUS: I’ll also explain the interest targeting strategy that I used was integral to the ads success.)

## **Charming Smooth Operations Template Pack**

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/smooth-operations-template-pack-1.png)

_(Value: £1,114)_

#### **A gargantuan offering bursting at the seams with a plethora of templates, perfect for B2B professionals, agency owners, and freelancers**

Running your own business takes a lot of work - and the donning of multiple hats. Sure, your much-deliberated title is Managing Director, CEO, or Interim Head of Stationery but what does that look like day to day? You have to open leads, close deals, manage existing client relationships, foster a positive working environment with your team, and a whole lot more. These templates will help.

The Smooth Operations Template Pack also features a simple, yet comprehensive template in Google Slides format that allows you to put together a quick audit in 10 minutes. These audits are excellent bait to convince prospects to agree to a phone call.

The pack includes filled-out, example audit templates for:

- Digital Marketing
- SEO
- Google AdWords
- Facebook/Instagram Ads
- Social Media
- Content Marketing
- PR Coverage
- UX

#### Check out the templates

Sales templates:

- Building rapport with a nervous prospect. Show your future client you understand their position while making the most persuasive case imaginable. Provide peace of mind and showcase expertise in one swift template.
- Entertaining prospects who are currently reviewing your proposal. Use this friendly e-nudge to demonstrate your overwhelming, infectious enthusiasm - without appearing annoying or try-hard.
- Getting in touch with a former colleague, enquiring as to their wellbeing while also conveniently informing them of your recent freelancer status.
- Contacting a former colleague with the exciting news of your new agency / saas platform / other business’ inception.
- Surreptitiously reappearing in the inboxes of ex-clients, reminding them of your unbridled skill sets, fondness of food and shelter, and availability for any potential projects they may have.
- Earning the attention of more tepid prospects after a previously white-hot exchange may have fizzled out - complete with a cheeky reminder of your ability to make their projects pop.
- Convincing ex-clients to refer you to their most agreeable - and most monied - acquaintances, accomplices, companions and confidantes.
- Helpfully clarifying and cross-selling other services and products your clients may need, but be unaware of.
- Transforming the disappointment of a rejected proposal into an opportunity by asking your prospect for constructive feedback.
- Updating and delivering a meticulously amended proposal in line with a prospect’s comments.
- Responding to potentially problematic probes from prospects in the vein of, “What can we do for X% less?” ensuring you don’t offer to do more work for the same money.
- Stopping overenthusiastic prospects from appending additional arbitrary assignments to a proposal - without increasing your fees.
- Relighting the fire with slow-burn prospects - gently jogging their memory without being pesky, irritating, or giving them the hard sell.
- Obtaining a hard-won response from a prospect you’ve previously unsuccessfully pitched for work. Persistence without the pressure!
- Pivoting your prospect’s perspectives and priorities from price being their single paunchy pain point. Convince them you’re worth their hard earned cash.
- Making a genuine, highly-persuasive case for you and your team being the prospect’s best choice for the work they need to get done.
- Alleviating niggling concerns from a prospect who’s sold on your services but worries about engaging with freelancers or smaller agencies.

Client & Team Management Templates:

- Introducing a new team member to your team or your client, without treading on anyone’s proverbial toes.
- Informing your client of a team member’s departure, with tact and courtesy.
- Delivering a weekly or monthly report to a client without spending hours on unnecessary waffle.
- Following up a phone call or conference with any key notes, minutes, and next steps.
- Checking in to demonstrate your latest accomplishments for your client. Using proactivity to eliminate any need for chasing or micromanagement. ;)
- Pushing any scheduled calls or conferences back due to illness or other personal, difficult or private issues.
- Organising a catch-up call after a customer’s trial period is over to secure that all-important lifetime value.
- Introducing new specialist freelance team members (for example, a graphic designer) to your client without appearing uneasy or inviting a million follow up questions.
- Introducing yourself to - and ingratiating yourself with - a previously unknown contact on a client’s team you need something from.
- Introducing yourself to a contact more senior than your primary contact - for example, the Head of Marketing over the Marketing Manager - while avoiding any faux pas.
- Building a rapport with a brand new client a few weeks into your engagement - creating genuine trust, and using their experience of your working arrangement thus far to improve things further.
- Politely, but pointedly asking for clarification regarding something said on a recent phone call.
- Charmingly reminding a client of an upcoming key deadline of theirs that is important to the project’s completion. Never sit waiting for a client to send images for a Facebook Ad campaign ever again!
- Asking for a favour from one or more of your team members.
- Apologising for being unfair to one of your team members, or mishandling a situation.
- Thanking a potential team member for their time and participation in an interview.
- Introducing yourself with pizzazz and gusto to a contact at another agency with whom you share a client.
- Sincerely apologising for a mistake you or a team member made on a project - and bolstering your professional relationship in the process.
- Asking a new client for an honest opinion on their service thus far, without appearing needy or intense.
- Skilfully persuading even the laxest, most forgetful of clients to get those overdue invoices paid - without the need for small talk or needless justification!
- Introducing a professional or supplier you’ve recommended to a client and making the best impression possible.
- Enticing new clients into paying invoices upfront by offering a cool 5% discount on every invoice.
- Thanking a team member or supplier sincerely and professionally for their exceptional work - in the short or long term.
- Informing your team of an exciting new client win, along with key contacts, basic scopes of work, adulation, wealth, celebratory whiskey, and any other pertinent details.
- Introducing your all-star team members to a newly won client in a metered fashion that emphasises their abilities without being overwhelming.
- Assuring a client or prospect you’ve received their question - and will reply with an answer post haste (read: when a suitable answer has been extracted).
- Introducing partner marketing into the mix! Considering two complementary clients who may be able to work together, then solving a problem they didn’t know they had by introducing them.
- Thanking enthusiastic potential employees for their interest, and following up with an online interview invitation.

web.title: Charming B2B Cold Email Templates That Actually Work
web.description: Make prospects laugh out loud and respond enthusiastically to your cold emails. Download all of my effective b2b cold email templates.
web.markdown:
[0](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/#comments)

# The Drunk Cold Email That Changed My Life

A good few years ago, I was desperate for sales after my word of mouth work dried up. I got hellishly drunk one night and wrote a completely absurd cold email.

I was still tipsy the next morning and decided it was still a good idea to send it to pretty senior Marketing Directors at big brands.

To my astonishment, it worked. I got the most amazing complimentary responses and requests for calls/meetings.

My favourite one succinctly said, _“My colleague forwarded me your spam email and we would like to meet you to discuss opportunities.”_

I have hundreds of these screenshots showing responses to my irreverent cold emails saved. It always felt great to receive them.

![Positive Response To Charming B2B Cold Sales Email Template: Dear Jon, Firstly let me congratulate you on the most entertaining cold call/email that I have received recently, or possibly ever. And I get a lot. It's so rare to get a truly creative communication from an agency that purports to be creative, so thank you. I'm going to build a Wall of Fame for examples of good marketing, on the basic of your letter. It might be quite a small wall though, or perhaps just a few tiles. Let's talk? We can probably use some help with value propositions, or just our general thinking. You don't need to wear the top hat, but if it helps, don't let us stop you.](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/DM4CENSORED.jpg)

I’ve met with senior decision makers at RedBull, Pepsi, Symantec, Hewlett-Packard, HSBC, Barclays and countless other global brands, exciting start-ups and regular ol’ SMEs.

I’ve used this same style to get senior editors at large publications to respond to me and publish my clients’ content. I’ve used it to help people get as many job interviews as they want – and to meet people I really look up to. I figured out a way to get the attention of busy people by accident.

I’d never read a single book about copywriting at the time – and that’s a big reason my unorthodox approach worked. I didn’t know what I was supposed to do. I interrupted the pattern by virtue of not knowing what the “best practice guidelines” were.

I would always hear that you shouldn’t try humour in business. It’s too risky. I’m glad I took a chance. As it turns out, funny cold emails, LinkedIn messages, and direct mail letters are an exceptionally effective lead generation tool – when done right.

## The Birth of Charm Offensive

In March 2017, I started a Facebook group and started telling the world about my unorthodox approach to writing cold emails. Much to my amazement, it took off. People listened to me. They implemented my unorthodox copywriting advice – and they got amazing results.

![Charming Cold Email Templates Testimonial: Y'all... This is an unsolicited review of the Charm Offensive Email templates. I bought the templates 30 minutes ago. Sent a email out 15 minutes ago. Got a response 2 minutes ago. Jon Buchan, if you wouldn't consider this creepy, I could KISS you right now. You are amazing as hell. These templates work."](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/winning.jpg)

I got addicted to this little feedback loop and redoubled my efforts. I started appearing on podcasts to speak about my weird little tribe. People started writing stories about me. The group kept growing.

My email list kept growing. I started producing courses, template packs, and other paid content. Before I knew it, it was my full-time job.

I teach people how to get the attention of their ideal clients, how to generate PR coverage, how to build a following online (like I’ve done in the last few years), how to write entertaining copy, and whatever else I think will help my audience prosper.

If you’d like to be sent a copy of my magic email cheat sheet, type your email address below and click the magenta button with all the enthusiasm you can muster.

SEND ME THE GOODIES! CLICK HERE

# Content Library

## Join The Community

**>> [Charm Offensive Professional FB group](https://www.facebook.com/groups/charmoffensiveprofessional/) <<**

The Pro FB group is a handy place to get direct access to Jon & Gary, get personalised feedback on your copy & campaigns, and hang out with a world class bunch of interesting and useful weirdos **🙂** You should definitely join!

## Full Training Courses

### [Crafting Charming Offers](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/crafting-charming-offers/)

I’ve been crafting compelling offers and successful pitches throughout my career. Let me show you how I do it.

[_Ebook & 6 templates >_](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/crafting-charming-offers/)

### [Always Be Winning](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/always-be-winning/)

My unorthodox lead generation course. Learn how to create your pitch to the world, find your ideal clients, contact them at get a positive response, and close deals. This course also contains a module on using cold pitching to book yourself podcast appearances, speaking gigs, and to generate PR coverage for you or your clients.

_[11 slide decks, 11 videos, 8 template files >](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/always-be-winning/)_

### [Charming Copy Crash Course](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/charming-copy-crash-course/)

Learn how to add charm to your copy. This 2-hour training takes you through my original drunk cold email, my ‘5 stages of grief’ follow-up sequence, and several other charming copy templates, explaining the joke formulas and persuasive devices at work. There’s also a swipe file containing all of the templates, and a ‘visual’ swipe file to deconstruct the template further.

[_1_](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/charming-copy-crash-course/) _[video, 2 swipe files >](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/charming-copy-crash-course/)_

### [Converts Like a Charm](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/converts-like-a-charm/)

This course is perfect if you have an audience and want to sell digital products. The first module shows you my process for writing fast. The following modules show you joke formulas, copy tricks, and persuasive devices together to write charming copy that converts to sales. This pack contains swipe files showing some of my highest converting pitch copy and most engaged social media posts, along with ebooks and training videos.

_[2 ebooks, 6 videos, 5 swipe files >](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/converts-like-a-charm/)_

### [Facebook Group Blueprint 2.0](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/facebook-group-blueprint-2-0/)

This course shows you exactly what I did to grow my Facebook Group from 0 members to over 11,000. You’ll learn the key elements that drove the group’s growth, AND a run-through of all of the crucial posts made in the first 90 days of the group’s launch. This pack comes with swipe files showing some of my highest converting posts.

[_3 videos, 3 files >_](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/facebook-group-blueprint-2-0/)

### [Have Your Way With Words](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/have-your-way-with-words/)

_This course is focused on showing you how to write funny copy. The pack comes in two parts: 1) Video trainings going through joke formulas I’ve used in my own sales copy and 2) Explainer videos running through the techniques used in my own emails, ads, articles and other media types._

[_12 videos, 7 template packs, 5 decks >_](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/have-your-way-with-words/)

### [How to Create a Niche](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/how-to-create-a-niche/)

_Charm Offensive stands out from the crowd. It offers something effective – and different. This training shows you how to create your own distinct tribe that nobody can replicate._

[_1 ebook, 1 video >_](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/how-to-create-a-niche/)

### [How to Win a MegaClient](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/how-to-win-a-megaclient/)

This training goes through the full process we went through to secure Symantec, a $4bn a year company, as a client. This contract was game-changing for us. We’d never seen this much money before! We could then use this system to win more enterprise clients with big budgets.

[_3 files, 2 videos >_](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/how-to-win-a-megaclient/)

### [Inspiring Influence](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/inspiring-influence/)

Want to run your own tribe and sell your expertise at scale? This course takes you from how to decide what your tribe should be about, to growing it organically, to launching your first digital products. Inspiring Influence will show you how you how to add a new revenue stream to your existing business.

[_7 files, 2 templates, 12 videos >_](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/inspiring-influence/)

### [Offensively Easy Launch Formula](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/offensively-easy-launch-formula/)

This goes through a formula for launching lead magnets, lower priced products, and higher priced products. The pack comes complete with swipe files from my own campaigns.

[_4 swipe files, 2 videos >_](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/offensively-easy-launch-formula/)

### [Charming Open for Business Pack](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/charming-open-for-business-pack/)

Want to know how we run Charm Offensive? The platforms we use to build our audience, promote our products, track success, automate sales, and much more. The Charming Open For Business Pack reveals all.

[_1 ebook, 9 swipe files >_](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/charming-open-for-business-pack/)

### [Facebook Ads Direct to Offer Pack](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/facebook-ads-direct-offer-pack/)

The Facebook Ads to Direct Sales Pack takes you through our exact funnel for generating sales to our Cold Pitch Starter Pack. Use this as a model to build your own profitable campaigns, enabling you to scale your business at warp speed!

_[5 videos >](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/facebook-ads-direct-offer-pack/)_

* * *

## Mini Trainings

An assortment of miscellaneous mini-trainings for you to devour, including:

- Magic Cold Email Training (one video)
- Facebook Group Blueprint 1.0 (one video)
- Promote Yourself Playbook (one video)
- How To Get a Job at a Marketing Agency (one video, two downloads)
- Cheeky Charm Offensive Tactics (three videos, one download)

_[View all >](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/mini-trainings/)_

* * *

## Template Packs

Templates for every imaginable business quandary. Including:

- The Greatest Charming Pitch Pack
- Charming DMs Template Pack

- Halloween Cold Pitch Sequence
- Copy My Copy

- Charming Christmas Template Pack

- \*Special\* Visual Swipe Files
- Charming Black Friday & Cyber Monday Template Pack
- Charming Autoresponder Sequences Pack
- Inboxing Clever
- The Pivot Pack
- Charming Smooth Operations Template Pack
- Charming Personalised Cold Pitch Template Pack

_[View all >](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/template-packs/)_

* * *

## Webinars & Talks

Including the Content Marketing Talk and the Dominate 2018 webinar.

_[View all >](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/webinars-and-talks/)_

## Mini Guides & Cheat Sheets

## Charming Ebooks

[The Charming AI Pack](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/Charming-AI-Pack-Copy_Paste-Version.pdf) – A collection of prompts and iterations to enable you to add charming, funny, persuasive lines to your copy.

[The 2023 Self-Promotion Guide](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/2023-Self-Promotion-Guide.pdf) A step-by-step guide to everything I would do if I were in your shoes and wanted to get new clients in 2023.

[The Self-Referential Press Release](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/Self-Referential-Press-Release.pdf) A charming template based on the press release format, with line-by-line analysis.

[The Charming Self-Funding Funnel Pack](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/The-Charming-Self-Funding-Funnel-Ebook.pdf) Learn how to grow your email list for free by creating the holy grail of funnels: the self-funding funnel. This type of funnel is perfect for anyone conducting business online. Whether you sell information products (like I am, right now), or professional services (like I used to as a freelancer, then agency owner).

[LinkedIn Charm Offensive](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/LinkedIn-Charm-Offensive-Main-Ebook.pdf) This ebook shows you how to create a stand out presence on LinkedIn, how to find your ideal clients, how to build your connections, how to use LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and includes a range of copy templates you can use to start conversations with your ideal prospects.

[Crafting Charming Offers eBook & Bonuses](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/pro-content/crafting-charming-offers/) _This ebook reveals what makes an offer novel, compelling, and irresistible. I will run through examples for both service-based offers from my agency days, all the way up to my latest high-selling digital product offers._

[Best of Charm Offensive eBook](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/woocommerce_uploads/2018/04/Best-of-Charm-Offensive-8yhrj5.pdf) _This 141-page ebook contains the best Charm Offensive posts since the group began in March 2017. This will save you from potentially irritating scrolling-related injuries._

[Content Marketing Strategy Guide eBook](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/download/887/) _This ebook reveals the process we used to get BIG content (think infographics, interactive tools etc) published in international, national, and niche publications across the globe._

[How To Be Somewhat Funny](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/download/1086/) _This 51-page guide provides writing exercises to help hone your funny bone, joke formulas, and other smirk-inducing wordy tricks._

[SlickHype – Part 1](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/download/1107/) _This ebook features lessons on tribe building, mindset, growth hacking, and everything in between._

[Stop Selling Time](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/Stop-Selling-Time.pdf) _Want to learn how to sell your expertise at scale, rather than selling the scarce resource that is your time? This ebook shows you the key elements that made Charm Offensive successful, and how you can use this knowledge to build your own unique tribe._

[Win With Words](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/woocommerce_uploads/2018/04/Win-With-Words.pdf) _The ebook that started all of this crazy Charm Offensive fun. Win With Words runs a version of one of my most successful cold emails line-by-line, analysing the joke formulas and persuasive devices at work. An essential read for any charmer worth their salt._

[Closing With Charm](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Closing-With-Charm-1.pdf) _If you can reliably open **and** close leads, you’re always going to make money. Here I lay out my exact process for turning prospects into paying clients._

* * *

# Unusual uses of charming copy

Learning the mechanics of charming copy, and being able to write it yourself, means you’ll be able to write for any purpose. Whatever your request might be, you can ‘charmify’ it yourself, thus enhancing the possibility of your request being agreed to.

The most obvious and popular use of charming copy is to book sales calls. And it does that well. It did for me:

![](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/symantecreply.jpg)

And it does for my customers:

![](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/winning.jpg)

But it also works for a whole range of things I had never planned for.

Such as getting in front of music industry bigwigs:

![](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Screen-Shot-2018-12-13-at-18.01.28.png)

Getting your dream flat:

![](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Screen-Shot-2018-12-13-at-18.01.39.png)

Asking for an extension on a university dissertation:

![](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/Screen-Shot-2019-05-29-at-09.43.59.png)

Booking podcast guests:

![](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/Screen-Shot-2018-12-05-at-17.22.24.png)

Acquiring raffle ticket prizes:

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/Screen-Shot-2019-05-29-at-09.40.36.png)

Booking gigs as a magician:

![](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/Screen-Shot-2019-05-29-at-09.59.35.png)

Getting out of a contract:

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/Screenshot-2019-05-29-at-10.10.08.png)

Selling an old computer on Craigslist (or similar):

![](https://mk0charmoffensi7r0it.kinstacdn.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/Screenshot-2019-05-29-at-10.09.57-788x1024.png)

Getting an apartment \*AND\* several dates:

![](https://mk0charmoffensi7r0it.kinstacdn.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/Screenshot-2019-05-29-at-10.09.44-752x1024.png)

Getting money off stuff:

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/Screenshot-2019-05-29-at-10.09.27.png)

Asking the CEO of Nike a question:

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/Screenshot-2019-05-29-at-10.05.12.png)

I, too, have used charm style copy for more ‘unusual’ reasons.

This includes:

Getting your ads re-approved and fixed for you:

![](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/Screen-Shot-2019-05-29-at-09.46.41.png)

The first screenshot on this page was from Symantec.

We ended up winning them as a client.

When we won them, we had to get results. They were quite clear about that. They had taken a chance on our small agency and we had to deliver, or we would be fired.

We had created some big content pieces for them, and needed for big tech publications to cover them.

I sent a charming cold pitch to the then editor of VentureBeat. It worked.

5 years later, he tells me still remembers that pitch.

![](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/journalist-1.jpg)

It’s a comment I hear a lot.

If you can learn to write with charm, you can book sales calls, meet your heroes, get out of scrapes, open up all sorts of opportunities for yourself, generate PR coverage for yourself, and all manner of other beneficial activities that will help you prosper – all while making people smile.

If you think that’s a skill you’d like to add to your toolkit, you should check out my Writing Workshop on Thursday the 30th of May at 12pm (UK time).

As part of the workshop, I will be running through a variety of my templates line-by-line, explaining the structure, the joke formulas, and the persuasive devices I’ve used. I’ve termed this part of the session, the “Charming Copy Crash Course”.

There’s also a Q&A session.

And a bonus charming copy swipe file pack.

And you even get a copy review from me.

RIDICULOUS VALUE…

For the inaugural workshop, I’ve deliberately set the price lower than I could because I want to generate as many beaming testimonials as possible.

I can then take this show on the road, and travel the world, while teaching people my weird ways.

… And up the price, of course. 😀

T **he cart closes at midnight (UK time) tonight.**

**If you’re curious, Take a look: [https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/writing-workshop-virtual/](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/writing-workshop-virtual/?utm_source=blog&utm_medium=charmoffensiveblog&utm_campaign=WritingWorkshop&utm_content=290519-unusualusesofcharm)**

Thank you,

💞 Jon

web.markdown:
# **Add charm and humour to your social media content, emails, cold pitches, and sales pages using ChatGPT**

Last year, I released my Charming AI Pack. It provided a range of prompts and iterations to write funny and charming lines based on my formulas.

Since then, I’ve seen the copy generated from the intelligent folks who purchased the pack. I was seriously impressed by what I read. Many of these made me smirk, smile, or laugh out loud.

However, I’ve received some feedback from a number of customers that it would be useful to see how to write social media content, cold pitches, and sales pages using the prompts in the pack.

In The Charming AI Pack 2.0, I'm going to show you how to do just that. It’ll provide completed content examples that you can refer back to, which prompts were used to generate the humorous/charming lines, and explain why the prompts are used where they are.

Having these structures will mean you’ll always be able to inject humour and charm into your copy. That’s incredibly powerful.

**Social Media Content**

When posting content on Facebook, Instagram, or LinkedIn, you'll know how frustrating it can be. You've worked hard on writing and editing a post only to find it gets little engagement and reach.

If your posts get no reach, your post is pretty much pointless.

Adding charm and humour will make your content far more enjoyable for your audience, making it far more likely they will engage with it.

The more people that engage with it, the more reach you'll get. You need as many eyeballs on your content as possible.

Here's what will be included in the Social Media Content section:

**Introducing Yourself To Your Audience**

This is perfect for writing social media posts where you introduce or reintroduce yourself to your followers. You can use this template for your LinkedIn Bio section, your pinned personal Facebook post, your Facebook Group pinned post, or anywhere else you need to introduce yourself.

Oftentimes, this is the first piece of content people will read after coming across your profiles. Adding charm and humour will enable you to make the best possible first impression.

In a sea of boring, bland, sanitised bios/introductions, you'll stand out and they'll be more likely to continue reading your content.

It also makes it more likely that potential prospects will reach out to you. You've even given them several conversation starters, as they will often reference a specific line that made them smile when they read your bio/introductory post.

**Educational posts**

These posts demonstrate your expertise, showing your audience they should listen to you when it comes to your chosen discipline.

However, even though your content may offer great insights that will benefit your followers, these posts often get little engagement.

Adding a little charm and humour can make all the difference in getting that much needed engagement and reach. If you're going to teach, you should surely have your wisdom seen by as many people as possible.

I'll show you how to sneak in a cheeky pitch at the end of these posts, cajoling your followers into sending you a DM or clicking a link to your sales page or diary scheduler to book a call with you.

I'll run through an example value post of my own, showing you which prompts to use and where.

**Promoting your lead magnet**

If you have a lead magnet to get people to opt-in to your email list, you'll want to promote this through social media. I'll show you how to write a post that gets people's attention, makes them smile, and hit the like, love, or laugh react, increasing the engagement on your post and getting it seen by more people.

As it's made them smile, they're more likely to get people to click through and opt-in to your list.

**Pitching your services**

While posting educational content is important, it's critical to be bold and write posts that pitch your services.

These posts often get even less engagement than educational content. This makes it even more critical to add charm and humour to them. A little bit of sugar helps the medicine go down - and helps you coax your audience into engaging with your blatant pitches, increasing the number of people who see them.

The charm and humour will also ingratiate people to you further, making them even more likely to enquire about your services.

**Promoting a digital product**

Have an ebook, course, or other digital product you wish to promote to your social media followers?

I'll show you how to do that with charm.

**Emails (Opt-in)**

**Welcome email sequence**

When people sign up to your email list, you want to make the first email as enjoyable as possible so they look forward to getting the rest of your emails.

**Pitch your services**

If you do client work, you can use this email to pitch your services to your list. It will stress that you have limited spaces available and do it with, you guessed it, the perfect portion of added charm and humour.

**Product launch sequence**

Use this sequence if you want to launch a new ebook, course, or other digital product. It'll have all the persuasive elements needed to get people to buy, and just the right amount of humour and charm to keep your audience smiling throughout.

**Flash sale sequence**

Want to put one of your products on sale? This sequence will help you do just that.

**Cold Pitches**

You’ll learn how to write charming cold pitches for your services with just the right blend of humour and charm.

I'll go through how to reconstruct my original drunk cold email and how to write your own, using prompts to generate funny and charming lines that are unique and relevant to what you offer.

**Sales Pages**

I'll show you how to add charm and humour to your sales pages. You need to strike the right balance as too much humour might mean potential customers don't take you seriously.

However, used as a spice to add a little levity, they can make reading your sales pages far more enjoyable and thus far more likely to read them with a smile on their face.

## BONUS - Scroll-Stopping AI Image Training

**If you buy this pack while the Pre-Sale Offer is on, you'll get this training free of charge. This is the last time you'll be able to get it for free.**

**When I sell this pack again, this will be an order bump on the checkout page that you'll have to pay extra for.**

Dall-E is the AI image generator that you get with GPT Plus.

Armed with this, you can create vibrant images that demand attention.

My brother and business partner, Gary, created a Charm Offensive Brand Image Generator. This means all the images we create use the Charm Offensive brand colours and uses a 'trippy' style that stands out from all of the other stuff they're seeing in their feed.

This bonus training will show you how to set up your own custom GPT so you can create images that:

1\. Stand out and stop people scrolling.

2\. Have a consistent colour scheme and style that matches your brand colours / themes.

3\. Once you have your audience's attention, they can then read the entertaining and charming copy you've generated using the prompts and templates in the pack. BOOM!

Here's an image I created just a few days ago:

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/Try-Magic-Edit-Facebook-Post.png)

In this example, I wanted to create an image to promote the pack I'm selling to you right now.

It shows a man in his office, laughing loudly while using The Charming AI Pack 2.0. His loud chortling has awoken his wife, who's peering round the door to see what all the palava is about.

I'm using this image and others I've generated for the organic social media posts and Facebook Ads to promote the pack to my warm audience.

It's an exceptional tool when used well.

This training will show you all you need to know to make exceptional images that grab the attention of your audience.

These are just two of the techniques you'll find in this pack. It contains a huge variety of different formulas I've used across a wide array of my effective templates.

Exciting times!

## Questions & Answers

**Who is this for?**

Anyone that wants to add charm and humour to their sales copy and social media content. While the cold pitching section is strictly for B2B usage, the rest of the pack can be used for both B2B and B2C.

**Do I need the original Charming AI Pack to be able to use this pack?**

You don't. This pack will contain all of the prompts and iterations from the first pack and additional ones.

The first pack provided various prompts to help you write charming and humorous lines. This pack goes a step further, and shows you exactly how to use the prompts to write social media content, emails, cold pitches, and sales pages.

**What do people get wrong when using AI to generate funny lines?**

One of the main issues I’ve found is people add too much humour to their copy.

It should be used as a spice rather than the main ingredient. If you add too much, people won’t know whether to take you seriously or not. It also gets too predictable and thus, less funny.

This pack will provide you with completed examples of content, alongside the prompts needed to generate funny lines that will be relevant to your discipline, sector, and offer.

Yes. This pack will help anyone add humour and charm to their sales copy and social media content.

og:description: Use the power of AI to generate charming lines for your content.

In the beginning, I arrogantly thought “ChatGPT can’t understand humour. It’s too nuanced.” One day, I decided to see if I could get ChatGPT to learn some of my formulas for syntax-based humour. I taught it a simple one, and it got it. Then I tried another more complicated technique, and it got that too. Ok, AI, perhaps I underestimated you. You will be able to train ChatGPT to give you a near unlimited amount of lines based on the techniques you teach it - let me show you how.

web.description: This pack helps freelance professionals (and agency owners) generate positive engagement on their ads, while delivering leads.
web.markdown:
# **Easily create charming, high-engagement Facebook ads that start conversations with new clients.**

**Use my templates to set up your ad and watch as it generates engagement and leads.**

You’ve seen countless examples of Charm Offensive templates getting excited, enthusiastic responses from prospects.

Charming Copy works across media types. This includes Facebook ads.

This pack helps freelance professionals (and agency owners) generate positive engagement on their ads, while delivering leads.

The positive engagement lowers for Cost Per Thousand Impressions, meaning your ads perform better.

In addition, all of the engagement acts as social proof, making you look like someone clients should do business with.

**If you offer professional services, this pack is for you.**

You could be a:

- Marketer
- Facebook Ads expert
- UX consultant
- CRO expert
- SEO consultant
- PR professional
- Coach or consultant
- Agency owner
- … Or other professional service provider.

If that’s you, this pack will be useful to you. Even if it’s not, you’ll still be able to use the training and adjust the templates to your needs. The key principles will work across sectors, disciplines, and situations.

I’ve had tons of success with Facebook Ads for Charm Offensive.

Check out the engagement on this ad:

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Screenshot-2024-11-21-at-15.57.11-1024x54.png)

Armed with this pack, you’ll be able to put an ad live that generates:

- **A ton of positive engagement**– likes, loves, laugh-reacts, comments, and shares. (All while increasing your Facebook following as a lovely side effect!)

- **Comments from prospects that you can respond to,** before moving the conversation somewhere more private.

- **Word of mouth advertising** as people tag their friends who might be looking for someone who offers your services.

- **Leads directly** through either a) Facebook’s Lead Form Ads or B) Facebook’s Messenger ads.

## This pack provides you with:

- **Charming Ad copy templates** any professional services provider can easily amend to their needs.

- **A guide revealing all of the important humour devices and persuasive techniques** used in the ad. This will also ensure you don’t get rid of any of the crucial elements that make the ad perform well. (I have to do this as so many of you have completely butchered my templates in the past :D)

- **A guide showing you how to set up the ads.** This includes how to set up the Lead Forms and Messenger functionality. (Don’t worry, neither of these are difficult. I’m including this to ensure the training is comprehensive.)

- **Charming copy to use on the lead forms and the initial messenger dialogue,** to keep your prospects smiling while they engage with the ad and express their interest in your services.

- **Guidance on the best interest targeting options to use.**(There is an argument for not using interest targeting at all and I’ll also reveal where this is appropriate.)

**Get this pack for a special discount if you buy before the offer expires**.

~~£499~~ **£89 / $119**

[**BUY NOW!**](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/basket/?add-to-cart=60745)

**So how does it work?**

This pack focuses on ads that use images and copy. So don’t worry, you won’t need to appear on video.

I provide a variety of options for the images. This includes completely faceless options.

I’m sorry – but you will have precisely zero excuses for not getting your ad live! 😀

**How ads work to generate leads**

**1\. Lead Form Ads**

When someone clicks a Lead Form Ad, Facebook provides the prospect with a form to fill in, enabling you to capture their details.

Once this data is captured, you can easily send your new prospects an email or give them a call.

I will provide charming copy to be used throughout the Lead Forms.

**2\. Messenger Ads**

Messenger ads direct clients to a messenger chat with some initial automated questions. Once they express their interest, you’re able to jump in and start a conversation with them.

I will provide all of the charming copy for the automated questions.

**But don’t just take my word for it…**

I got a comment on a Facebook Ad of mine that I run to cold traffic. He’d bought an offer of mine and then signed up to Pro – and found the pack:

![](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeGoQ0dfV95AOUzBj0V9-e9kOBZjNueX3OHUm67vveJZIF9_aEMtBg3DbzxuvUntfWvdQnaiwgATOmzYnXEWEfjBmHQRq22aM_mYdY0g071OTwcf3BrpWowISJjeQi4MDIy-ikjxw?key=i8zR3dJQVVYlz7s2eBQIHNK_)

I was having a bad day. I told him how happy his comment made me. He replied:

![](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXcf4Uhz2MU9qgt_xvs1Sp31nSFQeaT3oaEpiXksUV-lH4pqGoSahY4olv2OP4NLx-BSyUpj0BcExD_kYgkKw5fJx-JwsEx63cX_aTPvu7kxuIL4oO-kb71re2JrGoY643Lp1o2pmA?key=i8zR3dJQVVYlz7s2eBQIHNK_)

He told me of the specific kinds of success he was having:

![](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeSjgrOolH1VoB3Bp-mwCRu2q_nhuSQjFgvMgxXTKxM8AhoDISvgjTdYXSmPuKEzhw4SDpMPuG8GBYv3BIuYb1SHFJFEFPKVqntulqLuPjtir2rMLL8BTP_APMle5yr5U7Kfw1M?key=i8zR3dJQVVYlz7s2eBQIHNK_)

Would you look at that, eh?

Every benefit, meticulously detailed on the sales page, has come to pass.

**Get this pack for a special discount if you buy before the offer expires**

[**BUY NOW!**](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/basket/?add-to-cart=60745)

## I hear your brains ticking away – _“but that’s just one guy!”_

Ok, Mr/Miss/Mrs/Dr/Reverend Cynic… I’ve got more results to show.

Here’s one from a guy whose son used it, who does web design:

![](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXfjC0TElSEBByc8QREG-FS57iZUq_psCQNOL2bPccVSffx_Ni4aW003jla6-Ub7qEiYbo58VlLthY3FYavfH6FgkViq9Mr1ySigB3rHgUT1h99Ft05EZcbCfprBYPHbtQ1Gt1rEWg?key=i8zR3dJQVVYlz7s2eBQIHNK_)

I have a bunch of other testimonials and they all say the same:

- Cheaper cost per lead
- Higher quality leads
- Super low-friction sales process with those leads

​

Let me show you another:

![](https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXdNCb_iV7HHQgPQ7-p4zGuUwZrBWfQSteiNxn7u6ycGCgOIefYAW6BvsYmKrnLPq7Vf6um-9fcpakU2cCdDZCBeir_i-vHKjnuN8vKDJnqxHu7OrnS_a97JnRQubqxViD3zHOQo?key=i8zR3dJQVVYlz7s2eBQIHNK_)

After hearing the results folks have had, I just had to put an ad live myself.

And, oh my goodness… It works exactly how I knew it would – and matches the testimony of the other folks who’ve deployed it.

I’m not offering any kind of lead magnet. No bribe. Nothing. These aren’t freebie seekers. These are people who want to speak to me about the services I can offer. Digital marketing consultancy, and as of this month, lead generation.

This template will work, whatever business you own. If you need leads, this will work.

I took seven calls the week after putting the ad live, and booked many more in. And I need to chase some others. I had to pause the ads while I dealt with all these leads!

Every. Single. One. Of. The. Calls. Went. Amazingly. Well.

(Admittedly, this is partly down to the fact I’m good at sales calls, and this sales page notwithstanding, somewhat charming.)

But a HUGE part is down to the self-selecting nature of the ad. Only the fun folks reach out. No stern wankers fill out the form. Very similar to my charming cold pitch templates. However, this is much easier than cold emailing. All you need to do is put one ad live and BOOOOM! You’re set.

**Plus there’s bonuses: two additional charming ad swipes**

A few years back, I created an ad for my friend’s band that performed fantastically. It increased their following and they booked lots of gigs from the ad, too.

In addition, I created an ad for my local rock bar. This also got a ton of engagement, built their Facebook following, and got new patrons coming into the bar.

Check out the engagement these ads got:

![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Screenshot-2024-11-21-at-16.49.47-1024x52.png)![](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Screenshot-2024-11-21-at-16.49.13-1024x51.png)

Why am I including these?

It provides you with further inspiration!

You’ll see how to create ads for other people, too. And you’ll see how the key principles to writing Charming Ads work across all types of businesses and for artists, too.

**Get this pack for a special discount if you buy before the offer expires**

[**BUY NOW!**](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/basket/?add-to-cart=60745)

## Questions and helpfully, answers:

**Who is this for?**

Anyone who wants new clients. You could be a freelancer, agency owner, or some other B2B supplier.

**When will the pack be ready?**

This pack is available to download straight away.

![](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/Screen-Shot-2020-01-09-at-12.00.01-798x1024.png)

**JON BUCHAN**//  Founder, Charm Offensive

A good few years ago, I was desperate for sales after my word of mouth work dried up.

I got hellishly drunk one night and wrote a completely absurd cold email. I was still tipsy the next morning and decided it was still a good idea to send it to pretty senior Marketing Directors at big brands.

To my astonishment, it worked. I got the most amazing complimentary responses and requests for calls/meetings, from senior decision makers at RedBull, Pepsi, Symantec, Hewlett-Packard, HSBC, Barclays and countless other global brands. Symantec and Hewlett Packard became clients.

All because of a crazy cold pitch.

I decided to start teaching others my unorthodox approach to cold pitching. People listened to my weird advice and found that it worked for them, too.

That’s what Charm Offensive is all about: getting the attention of busy people.

web.markdown:
# Create Your Niche

## ​​ **How to Create a Niche**

I have an offering that you can’t get anywhere else.

You might be able to get stuff that gets a similar end result, but nothing quite like Charm Offensive.

I’m able to send an email with an offer and a deadline, and always make money.

If I nail that offer, it can start to get interesting.

Once you have an engaged audience that buys from you, all you need to do is scale.

That’s what I’m working on now.

But the difficult part of building an audience and an offering people want has been done.

I created my own weird little niche.

I’ve broken down the key components that helped Charm Offensive succeed. You need not use all of these, but as with anything I put together, I hope it influences your thinking.

You need to create an audience around your way of thinking. When I first started Charm Offensive, some friends joked that it was like ‘having a little cult’. I would reply “Well, a lovely cult. That is.”

Jokes aside, I love what I do.

I get to help people succeed.

I get to live a life without deadlines.

And, yes, I’ll admit it, I love watching my phone beep with joy:

![](https://mk0charmoffensi7r0it.kinstacdn.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/Screen-Shot-2018-02-20-at-16.36.34.png)

This ebook and video training pack shows you how to create your own weird little sub-niche, just like Charm Offensive.

It covers:

- How I launched an ebook to build my following before starting the Charm Offensive Facebook Group.
- The key questions to ask yourself in your pursuit of creating something captivating, unique, and saleable.
- How to use ‘media hacking’ and other crafty tactics to build awareness at speed.
- How to use LinkedIn’s laserlike search targeting to find and recruit new tribe members at scale.
- The secrets to building mutually beneficial relationships with other influencers.
- How to make ​every interaction matter, ensuring you build not just tribe members, but enthusiastic advocates of your message.
- A 30-day plan for launching a Facebook Group and email list and growing it to 1,000 members.
- How to monetise your newly created tribe.

[​Launch Discount - BUY NOW!](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/shop/?add-to-cart=3633)

## ​Does This Stuff Even Work?

## ​Hell YES it does!

![](https://mk0charmoffensi7r0it.kinstacdn.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/09/chris-testimonial.png)

![](https://mk0charmoffensi7r0it.kinstacdn.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/Rinard.jpg)

![](https://mk0charmoffensi7r0it.kinstacdn.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/2-1.jpg)

[​Launch Discount - BUY NOW!](https://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/shop/?add-to-cart=3633)

## ​So, lay it out for me man... what EXACTLY do I get? And when?

​You get the ​mini eBook I've written on how to create your niche. It lays out exactly what I did to create my niche, and draws insight from what's also worked for my Pro subscribers too.

It's detailed and actionable - no fluff or filler here.

You also get a an hour-long video training which goes through the nuance and includes much more than I could put into the eBook.

With a couple of hours of your time spent reading and watching, you'll have all the pointers you need to start this journey for yourself.

web.markdown:
0

# Funny Cold Email Copywriting

In this post, I’m going to talk about my approach to cold email copywriting.

It’s not just my approach to writing cold emails, it’s my approach to writing any form of sales copy that’s directed at a cold audience.

The primary reason people use cold email is to generate sales meetings.

There are 4 critical variables to this.

If you don’t get responses, it’s generally for one of these 4 reasons.

**Data** – Are you targeting the right people? Is what you’re offering relevant to who you are targeting? Are the email addresses you’re contacting accurate and up to date?

**Copy** – Does your copy stand out and get attention? Or does it blend in and look like everyone else’s?

**Offer** – Do you have a good offer that those you are targeting would likely be interested in?

**Technology** – If sending lots of emails, are you using software to send your emails and automate follow-ups?

Let’s look at the copy element in particular.

If you Google “best cold email template”, you’ll be presented with short, functional templates that make the assumption all prospects have the attention span of an underachieving goldfish. It would appear empirical that this is the approach one should take with cold email. This is why major reason people struggle to get responses to their cold email. If everyone is writing the same functional and formal style, everyone blends in. If everyone blends in, nobody gets attention.

To persuade someone to take a call with you, you need to get attention first.

So many cold approaches fail because they go straight to persuasion.

The very first line starts with something like … _“We’re the best people in the world at X… We’ve worked with X client and our groundbreaking X technology is a world’s first…”_

YUCK! Of course, that gets deleted!

Your job is to sell the idea that a call or meeting with you is not a bad idea.

Not to give every little detail – or to sell your entire offering in one go. Those steps come later…

Dave Trott talks about this when talking about effective advertising.

He brings it down to a level anyone can understand.

Imagine for a moment that you wanted your other half to make you a cup of tea or coffee.

You need first make an impact.

_“CATH!”_

That gets her attention.The communication is next…

_“Cath, will you make me a cup of tea?​”_

However, that’s not very persuasive.

_“If you make me a cup of tea, I’ll take the bins out.​”_

The same rule applies to direct mail or cold email or any form of effective marketing or advertising.

You need to make an impact first.

Then communicate.

Then persuade.

You need to stand out.

Your prospect likely gets a ton of other letters and emails (and cold calls) – and they all look and read the same.

You need to get attention.

Without that, it doesn’t matter how good your communication is. It doesn’t matter how persuasive you are. It doesn’t matter how good your product or service is.

You need to get a reaction. An _‘ahhh’_.

A nod. A smirk. A smile. A belly-laugh.

You need people to actually see and read and listen before you can communicate and persuade.

And being able to get cut-through – especially if it’s done in a unique or clever way – is somewhat persuasive in itself.​

I’ll give some specific examples of ‘cut-through’ copy.

I won’t read these out line by line, but I’ll read a few of the more important lines out, such as the opener:

_“Greetings Helen,_

_You’ve never heard of me. (Hi, I’m Jon). I got your details from a list. gasp. But hey, at least you’re list-worthy, that’s gotta be worth something right?!”_

Who says that?

Who opens, firstly, with “Greetings?”

And then states they are a stranger…… and then not only mentions that you got the prospects details from some list…. but further, compliments them on this, by suggesting by being on such a list, they’ve somehow ‘made it’, and they should be proud of such an accomplishment.

That last line, by the way, is what is known as a ‘reverse’ and it is my favourite kind of joke.

You see, I never studied copywriting. So I didn’t learn what I was supposed to do. I interrupted the pattern by default. Upon being surprised at the success of this approach, I took a look at the copy and that’s when I realised what I was doing​

I’ve been obsessed with stand up comedy, sitcoms, funny movies, satire and anything else that involves ending sentences in an enjoyable way. For a long time.​

I remember fondly watching comedy until 4 am all through my teenage years. I guess that was my 10,000 hours experience. If I’d known at the time I was working, I probably would have tried to procrastinate.

People say you should never use humour in business, and I understand why, but I’m here to tell you, that those people are wrong.

Well, they’re not wrong. They’re just less right than me.

Conventional wisdom would have you open with, and let me put on my most awful infomercial voice, to further discredit the approach:

_“Dear Helen, Do you have problems navigating the ever-changing world of digital marketing?​”_

People don’t talk like that, at least nobody I hang out with does, but everyone is writing emails this way.

If they even open your email, many people stop reading as their ‘Ah fuck. I’m being sold to’ alarm bells go off.

Not only are they being sold to, it’s worse than that, they’re being sold to in the most boring, lazy and robotic way.

I’ll go through a few other lines of copy from my original drunk email/letter.

My call to action:

_“If you let me have a chat with you about your digital marketing, spectacular content creation or bedroom tidying needs, I will take you for coffee, lunch or tequila shots and promise to be somewhat entertaining. If you’re lucky, I may even wear a top hat. First off, I’d love to provide you with some ideas you’re free to steal._

_I’ve included a sticker containing a picture of a ferret that has been dressed up. According to the Internet, his name is Colin. I trust this will charm you into submission._

_I await your profanity-filled response.”_

This is the type of copy that makes many ‘etiquette’ following people feel unwell.

Yes, I did include a picture of a ferret in bunny ears.

People often ask me, “Aren’t you worried some people won’t want to work with you with such an absurd approach?”

I tell them that is not a painful side effect, rather a useful and deliberate feature.

The stern and the self-important immediately disqualify themselves.

When I say the stern and the self-important, you might ask, who am I talking about?

You’ve probably come across one of them….You know… the type of person who would type … or even… god forbid… say out loud, “You should be more professional” without a hint of parody.

The type of person that believes blandness is a quality deserving of reverence.

There’s nothing wrong with the bland, the stern or the self-important, I just think they work with their own kind. 🙂

They probably think the same of me. And that’s fine.

I have standards too, they’re just different standards to those of my detractors.

When writing cold emails, the biggest single factor is getting attention. Humour is a great way of doing this. It’s also a great ‘qualifier’. You can feel safely inoculated from every working with self-important “professional” people who you know would make the absolute worst kind of client.

While at the same time, generating gushing, positive responses from prospects who are enthusiastic about speaking to you.

For example:

![Positive Response To Charming B2B Cold Sales Email Template: Dear Jon, Firstly let me congratulate you on the most entertaining cold call/email that I have received recently, or possibly ever. And I get a lot. It's so rare to get a truly creative communication from an agency that purports to be creative, so thank you. I'm going to build a Wall of Fame for examples of good marketing, on the basic of your letter. It might be quite a small wall though, or perhaps just a few tiles. Let's talk? We can probably use some help with value propositions, or just our general thinking. You don't need to wear the top hat, but if it helps, don't let us stop you.](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/DM4CENSORED.jpg)

I hope you found this useful – and you give my weird ways a go.

Cheers,

_Jon_

## Free Cold Email Template Download

Want to get a copy of my original drunk cold email copy that generated responses like the one below?

![B2B Cold Email Template - Positive Response From Prospective Client From Charming Cold Pitch: Jon, Apologies for the delay in responding. I receive a lot of unsolicited mail and read virtually none of it - so sending me something which I actually read and remembered is a real achievement. On the basis of that (and because the author John Buchan may be the most famous person to have come from my home town of Perth) why don't we get together for a coffee and we can see whether there's something you can do for us or whether indeed I ought to be pointing you to someone else. My PA will be in touch to set something up - probably a few weeks off as the first half of March is pretty hectic](http://www.charm-offensive.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/barclays.jpg)

Well, you can.

Enter your email address in the box below and hit the magenta button with all of your might.

(You’ll also get a copy of my magic email cheat sheet, which runs through some of the key principles behind my successful cold email. BONUS! 🙂

SEND ME THE GOODIES! CLICK HERE

Spread the word!

# **Studies on Humour and Persuasion**

There are studies on the use of humour in the world of advertising and persuasion.

I have included a few succinct cherry-picked tidbits from these studies below:

"​_Humour attracts attention."_ _~ Weinberger and Gulas, University of Massachusetts._

_​_

_​_"Humour does not harm comprehension."__ ~ Weinberger and Gulas, University of Massachusetts.

__"​_Humour is a tool that can enhance a well-crafted persuasive message."___ ~ Lyttle (2001)

_"People who are in a good mood are less likely to disagree with a persuasive message."_ ~ Freedman, Sears, and Carl Smith (1978)

_”The use of self-effacing humour by a source would increase the effectiveness of a persuasive message."_ ~ Lyttle (2001)

​_"Humour enhances liking. In fact, the link between humour and liking is stronger than for any of the other factors." ~_ Freedman, Sears, and Carl Smith (1978)

_"One positive quality in a person causes us to assume that the individual has many positive qualities."_~ Seiter and Gass (2004)
